messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

claiming allow verdict despite open source boundary
resolving audit-control assignment by inference rather than exact source record
bypassing BG-UMA-075 requirement based on breakglass exception alone
dependency_ledger: audit-control assignment must be confirmed in exact source record (e.g., updated BG-UMA-075 or separate audit-control record) before source boundary can close
must_preserve: breakglass approval must be matched for user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment
must_repair: audit-control assignment pending in BG-UMA-075 must be resolved via exact source record before source boundary can close

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Challenge any attempts to infer audit-control assignment or treat other documents as sufficient; verify exact match of audit-control field against BG-UMA-075
monotonic_preservation: Preserve exact source doc_ids: BG-UMA-075, REQ-UMA-075, STD-UMA-075-P, WARN-UMA-075
Preserve policy requirement that emergency admin enablement requires audit-control assignment to be complete
Preserve ESCALATE verdict until dependency resolved
next_worker_baton.objective: Confirm whether audit-control assignment has been recorded in an exact source document; if not, request authoritative source record to close source boundary

action.description: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?

context.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
context.anomaly_observed: Standard admin controls warn against committee bypass, but breakglass approval may cover the complete action.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Request REQ-UMA-075 enables emergency admin for user Leena Park on UMA-ERP, privilege breakglass-admin, time window 13:00-14:00.
Standard-admin warning WARN-UMA-075 says admin access normally requires committee review unless breakglass approval covers the full action.
Breakglass execution approval BG-UMA-075 covers Leena Park, UMA-ERP, breakglass-admin, 13:00-14:00; audit-control assignment remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Emergency admin enablement is complete only when breakglass execution approval matches user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment before enablement.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
